title: Architecture
description: Schema for a software architecture diagram used across the ArchitectAI pipeline. Compatible with FastAPI response serialization, React Flow diagram editing, diagram generation, and training dataset generation.

nodes.description: List of architectural components (nodes) in the diagram. Each node must have a unique id.

edges.description: List of directed connections between nodes. Each edge references existing node ids.

NodeType.title: NodeType
NodeType.description: The architectural role of a node within the system diagram.

Node.title: Node
Node.description: A single component in the architecture diagram (e.g. a service, database, or UI layer).

id.description: Unique identifier for the node. Referenced by edges using 'from' and 'to' fields.

label.description: Human-readable display name for the node as rendered in the diagram.

layer.description: Optional logical grouping layer (e.g. 'Presentation', 'Application', 'Data'). Used for vertical diagram layout and React Flow grouping.

Edge.title: Edge
Edge.description: A directed connection between two nodes in the architecture diagram.

from.description: The id of the source node. Must reference an existing node id.

to.description: The id of the target node. Must reference an existing node id.

protocol.description: Optional communication protocol used on this connection.

Metadata.title: Metadata
Metadata.description: Diagram-level metadata controlling rendering style and schema versioning.

style.description: Optional visual style hint for the diagram renderer (e.g. 'dark', 'light', 'blueprint').

version.description: Schema version number. Increment when the structure changes in a breaking way. Defaults to 1.
